title: oenothera fruticosa var. linearis
intro: Oenothera fruticosa var. linearis, commonly known as the narrow-leaved evening primrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The narrow-leaved evening primrose has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
